title: Ethical and legal challenges with IoT in home digital twins
author: Dhinakaran, Edwin Raja, et al.
description: Review Highlights•The paper thoroughly explores the multifaceted ethical and legal dilemmas posed by IoT-enabled home environments, emphasizing privacy, security, consent, and regulatory compliance.•It provides a balanced discussion of current industry practices and government initiatives, alongside proposing best practices and legal frameworks for fostering sustainable IoT growth.•Real-world examples enrich the paper, illustrating the practical implications of IoT challenges and demonstrating the effectiveness of proposed solutions in addressing critical issues.
